## Summary

- Describe the problem this PR solves.
- Describe the change at a high level.

## Changes

- List the main code or docs changes.
- Call out any behavior changes or follow-up work.

## Testing

- Describe how you verified the change.
- Include commands if relevant.

```bash
pnpm lint
pnpm test
pnpm build
```

## Checklist

- [ ] I scoped this PR to a single clear change.
- [ ] I added or updated tests when behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated docs/examples when the user-facing API or workflow changed.
- [ ] I checked for breaking changes and called them out if present.
